title: USTA Account Takeover Prevention Employee Credential Incident
content:
This playbook automates the detection and response process when compromised employee credentials are identified via USTA platform.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the PRODAFT  pack (USTAv4, partner-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management, Malware, Ransomware, Breach Notification, Phishing.

Inputs — MinimumPasswordLength: Minimum compromised credential's password length required for Playbook to work.

Integrations/scripts used: StringLength.
